title: Cat Totem
description: A resource pack that replaces the totem of undying with an animated pixel art cat
body:
# Animated Cat Totem
### By Nowon
ㅤ


Turns your totem of undying into a cute pixel art cat that even blinks

Currently only comes in 2 different colors, Tabby Cat and Grey Cat. More might be added at some point. Choose which one you want in the [versions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cat_totem/versions) tab


![Gif of cat blinking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/422985b4ad6181da63a62ef8ad193463ac405cb0.gif)


Tabby:
![tabby cat image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db8a38f8f8183149d4ba9a47f67e380abeb6c1b4.png)
Grey:
![grey cat picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1c43a99cc05ceb0f5b11d97db57f425c5f041e7.png)
